[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010100 2
1 10000111 4
2 11100000 3
3 00111001 4
4 11001010 4
5 10101000 3
6 10100011 4
7 11011111 7
